label: First Name
description: A contact's first name

label: Last Name
description: A contact's last name

label: Email
description: A contact's email address

label: Phone Number
description: A contact's primary phone number

label: Website URL
description: Associated company website.

label: Twitter Username
description: The contact's Twitter handle.

label: Street Address
description: Contact's street address, including apartment or unit number.

label: Candidate ID Result
description: Result of Candidate ID outreach effort

label: Filed Candidate
description: Indicates whether the candidate has officially filed to appear on the ballot with the appropriate election authority. If No, the record is Not Qualified.

label: Has ever been pro
description: Indicates whether this contact has ever had pro status or membership at any point in time

label: Verbal Serve
description: Indicates whether the contact has verbally opted in to Serve, similar to a verbal pledge

label: Product Line
description: Which product line they are suitable to test.

label: Candidate Office
description: Office for which the candidate is running

label: State/Region
description: The contact's state of residence. This might be set via import, form, or integration.

label: City
description: A contact's city of residence

label: Start date
description: Contact's start date. Required for the Facebook Ads Integration. Automatically synced from the Lead Ads tool.

label: # Opponents
description: Number of opponents the candidate has in their race

label: Contact owner
description: The owner of a contact. This can be any HubSpot user or Salesforce integration user, and can be set manually or via Workflows.

label: Marketing contact status
description: The marketing status of a contact

label: Contact unworked
description: Contact has not been assigned or has not been engaged after last owner assignment/re-assignment

label: Lifecycle Stage
description: The qualification of contacts to sales readiness. It can be set through imports, forms, workflows, and manually on a per contact basis.

label: Journey Stage
description: Track the status of a contact through a customer journey. It can be set through journeys, manually on a per contact basis, and through other tools.

label: Lead Status
description: The contact's sales, prospecting or outreach status

label: Lead Source
description: Source of host or volunteer lead outreach

label: Date entered current stage
description: The date this object entered its current pipeline stage

label: Date entered "Customer (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Customer' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date entered "Evangelist (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Evangelist' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date entered "Lead (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Lead' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date entered "Marketing Qualified Lead (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Marketing Qualified Lead' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date entered "Opportunity (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Opportunity' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date entered "Other (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Other' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date entered "Sales Qualified Lead (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Sales Qualified Lead' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date entered "Subscriber (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The date and time when the contact entered the 'Subscriber' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

label: Date Entered Win Stage 5 (Closed Won - Pro)
Date Entered Win Stage 6 (Activated Pro User)
Date Entered Win Stage Closed (Too Early)
Win activated user
description: Indicates whether this contact is a win activated user

label: Serve Onboarding Stage
description: Stage of the user's journey through the serve flow

label: Serve Results Viewed
description: Viewed serve results

label: Serve opt-in date
description: The date when the contact opted in to the Serve program or service.

label: Serve activated date
description: The date when the serve feature or service was activated for this contact

label: Serve results received date
description: The date when the Serve results were received for this contact

label: Serve results viewed date
description: The date when the Serve results were viewed for this contact

label: Serve lifecycle stage - became a lead date
description: The date when this contact entered the 'lead' stage of the serve lifecycle, used to track when they first became a lead.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became a Converted Date
description: The date when the contact reached the converted stage in the serve lifecycle process.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became an Activated Date
description: The date when the contact entered the 'Activated' stage of the Serve lifecycle.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became an No-Show SQL Date
description: The date when the contact entered the No-Show SQL stage in the serve lifecycle.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became an Opportunity Date
description: The date when the contact entered the Serve lifecycle stage and became an opportunity.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became an SAL Date
description: The date when this contact reached the SAL (Sales Accepted Lead) stage in the Serve lifecycle process.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became an SQL Date
description: The date when the contact entered the Serve Lifecycle Stage as a Sales Qualified Lead (SQL).

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became Churned Date
description: The date when the contact entered the Churned stage in the Serve lifecycle process

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became Not Qualified Date
description: The date when the contact entered the 'Not Qualified' stage in the serve lifecycle.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stage - Became Scheduled SQL Date
description: The date when the contact reached the 'Scheduled SQL' stage in the Serve lifecycle.

label: Serve Lifecycle Stages - Became retained date
description: The date when the contact entered the retained lifecycle stage

label: Marketing emails opened
description: The number of marketing emails opened for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Marketing emails clicked
description: The number of marketing emails which have had link clicks for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Last marketing email open date
description: The date of the most recent open for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Last marketing email click date
description: The date of the most recent link click for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Last Contacted
description: The last time a call, chat conversation, LinkedIn message, postal mail, meeting, sales email, SMS, or WhatsApp message was logged for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

label: Create Date
description: The date that a contact entered the system

label: Average Pageviews
description: Average number of pageviews per session for this contact. Set automatically.

label: First Referring Site
description: URL that referred the contact to your website. Set automatically.

label: Time First Seen
description: First time the contact has been seen. Set automatically.

label: First Touch Converting Campaign
description: Campaign responsible for the first touch creation of this contact.

label: First Page Seen
description: First page the contact visited on your website. Set automatically.

label: Time of First Session
description: First time the contact visited your website. Set automatically.

label: Last Referring Site
description: Last URL that referred contact to your website. Set automatically.

label: Time Last Seen
description: Timestamp for most recent webpage view on your website.

label: Last Touch Converting Campaign
description: Campaign responsible for the last touch creation of this contact.

label: Last Page Seen
description: Last page the contact visited on your website. Set automatically.

label: Time of Last Session
description: Timestamp for start of the most recent session for this contact to your website.

label: Number of event completions
description: Total number of events for this contact. Set automatically.

label: Number of Pageviews
description: Total number of page views this contact has had on your website. Set automatically.

label: Number of Sessions
description: Number of times a contact has come to your website. Set automatically.

label: Original Traffic Source
description: First known source the contact used to find your website. Set automatically, but may be updated manually.

label: Original Traffic Source Drill-Down 1
description: Additional information about the source the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

label: Original Traffic Source Drill-Down 2
description: Additional information about the source the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

label: Latest Traffic Source
description: The source of the latest session for a contact

label: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 1
description: Additional information about the latest source for the last session the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

label: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 2
description: Additional information about the source for the last session the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

label: Latest Traffic Source Date
description: The time of the latest session for a contact

label: Last Activity Date
description: The last time a call, chat conversation, LinkedIn message, postal mail, meeting, note, sales email, SMS, or WhatsApp message was logged for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

label: Next Activity Date
description: The date of the next upcoming activity for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

label: Number of times contacted
description: The number of times a call, chat conversation, LinkedIn message, postal mail, meeting, sales email, SMS, or WhatsApp message was logged for a contact record. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

label: Number of Sales Activities
description: The number of times a call, chat conversation, LinkedIn message, postal mail, meeting, note, sales email, SMS, task, or WhatsApp message was logged for a contact record. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

label: Candidate Date Verified
description: When a candidate became confirmed - stamped over from company-level property 'date_verified'

label: Candidate State
description: State in which the candidate is running

label: Circle attributed pledge
description: Indicates whether this contact's pledge is attributed to Circle. Options are Yes or No.

label: Circle Join Date
description: The date a candidate joined Circle

label: Circle Leaderboard Level
description: Shows the level attained on the Circle leaderboard

label: Circle Level 2 Code
description: The unique Stripe code for this user's Circle Level 2 rewards

label: Circle Level 5 Code
description: The unique Stripe code for this user's Circle Level 5 rewards

label: Circle Level 8 Code
description: The unique Stripe code for this user's Circle Level 8 rewards

label: Circle Roles
description: Contact is on Circle/came from Circle & indicates their roles on Circle

label: Clean Phone
description: This is a clean phone number field that should not contain anything other than digits. No parentheses, dashes, spaces, etc.

label: Conversion Source
description: Source of session when candidate converts

label: Conversion Source Drill Down 1
description: Drill down 1 source of session when candidate converts (from latest source)

label: Conversion Source Drill Down 2
description: Drill down 2 source of session when candidate converts (from latest source)

label: Country/Region
description: The contact's country/region of residence. This might be set via import, form, or integration.

label: General Election Result
description: Result for this candidate in their general election.. Copied from Company record.

label: Last CSAT survey date
description: The time that this contact last submitted a CSAT survey response. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Last CSAT survey comment
description: Last CSAT survey comment from this contact.

label: Last CSAT survey rating
description: Last CSAT survey rating from this contact.

label: Latest NPS survey rating
description: Latest NPS survey rating that this contact gave

label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

label: Number of opponents
description: Number of opponents the candidate has in their race

label: Number of Employees
description: The number of company employees

label: Sent holiday OOO
description: Indicates whether the contact has been sent a holiday out-of-office (OOO) message

label: Serve - Days between Poll Scheduled and Launched
Serve - Duration Between Results Received and Launch Date
Serve lifecycle stage
description: The current lifecycle stage of an elected official's user journey with Serve, from initial lead to retention or churn.

label: Serve meeting attended
description: Indicates whether this contact has attended a Serve meeting

label: Serve meeting booked
description: Indicates whether a Serve meeting has been booked for this contact

label: Serve opt in approved
description: Indicates whether the contact has been approved for serve opt in.

label: ANA (Acquired Not Activated)
description: contact has created an account (pledged) AND taken a meaningful action outside of product-defined activation (commenting in Circle multiple times, attending an event, completing a course), but has NOT been product-activated.

label: Pro Closed Won Rep
description: Rep who closed a Pro candidate

label: Marketing emails bounced
description: The number of marketing emails that bounced for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Email address quarantine reason
description: The reason why the email address has been quarantined.

label: Marketing emails delivered
description: The number of marketing emails delivered for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Email hard bounce reason
description: The issue that caused a contact to hard bounce from your emails. If this is an error or a temporary issue, you can unbounce this contact from the contact record.

description: The date of the latest reply for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Last marketing email send date
description: The date of the most recent delivery for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.
